XIn X, several Digimon, including a Muchomon were each transformed into a Mugendramon.
XIn X, several Digimon, including a Soulmon were each transformed into a Mugendramon.
XIn X, several Digimon, including a Yuki Agumon were each transformed into a Mugendramon.
XIn X/X, any Digimon afflicted with the Brain Hack Program will eventually become a Mugendramon. This is shown happening to a Gottsumon.
XIn X/X, any Digimon afflicted with the Brain Hack Program will eventually become a Mugendramon. This is shown happening to a Shoutmon.
XIn X/X, any Digimon afflicted with the Brain Hack Program will eventually become a Mugendramon. This is shown happening to a Tokomon.

XInteraction with  X. Apocalymon's  ability activates the  effect of the Digimon placed in Evolution Bases as an effect of itself, so by placing Omekamon while you have 1 or fewer Security, Apocalymon can use its  effect to evolve into X in the hand without paying the cost and ignoring evolution requirements.

XInteraction with X. Apocalymon's End of Your Turn ability activates the On Play effect of the digimon placed in evolution sources as an effect of itself, so by placing Omekamon while you have 1 or fewer security, Apocalymon can use its On Play effect to evolve into Omegamon X-Antibody in the hand without paying the cost and ignoring evolution requirements.
XThis Wolfmon is known in the game as Extra Wolfmon (EXヴォルフモン EX Vorufumon). (with or without X or X)
